sections.paragraph:
μυθικός, ή, όν (since Pla.) pert. to narrative of invented character, fictional καί τινα ἄλλα μυθικώτερα and other rather fictive tales (Pa 2:11); Eus. on Papias’ writings.

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

Eus. Eus. = Eusebius of Caesarea, various works; IV a.d.—List 5

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 660
